key_components: 19 factory methods organized by HTTP status codes
Helper function toAppException for error wrapping
patterns: Details object for additional error metadata
Stack trace preservation for V8 engines

patterns_discovered.description: Factory methods grouped by HTTP status: 401 (auth), 403 (authz), 400 (validation), 404/409 (resources), 429 (rate limit), 500/503 (server)
19 factory methods covering authentication, authorization, validation, resource errors, rate limiting, server errors, and domain-specific errors (modules, multi-tenancy)
Details object captures context: resource IDs, field names, conflicting identifiers, retry info, missing dependencies
Consistent UPPER_SNAKE_CASE error codes for i18n and client-side identification
Type guard (isAppException) and wrapper function (toAppException) for safe error handling
Comprehensive JSDoc comments with @example, @param, and usage descriptions for each factory method

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses Error.captureStackTrace to maintain proper stack traces in V8 engines, critical for debugging in production
Some factory methods (notFound, alreadyExists) dynamically generate error codes from resource names (e.g., 'MENU_NOT_FOUND') - ensure resource names are consistently cased
Details uses Record<string, unknown> which is flexible but requires careful typing in consuming code
Value field is optional for security reasons (to avoid exposing sensitive data), consumers must handle this gracefully
Wraps unknown errors but may lose important error type information - consider adding custom error class detection

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented a production-ready AppException class with comprehensive factory methods for standardized error handling
key_achievements: Created base exception class with proper Error inheritance and stack trace preservation
Implemented 19 specialized factory methods covering all major error scenarios
Organized methods by HTTP status codes for easy navigation
Added type guards and wrapper utilities for safe error handling
Included detailed JSDoc documentation with examples
Designed ValidationError interface for field-level validation errors
Provided extensible details object for context-specific metadata
approach_outcome.code_quality: High - well-documented, type-safe, follows single responsibility principle

recommendations.item: Add method for combining multiple validation errors
recommendations.rationale: Currently validation() accepts array but no convenience method to build errors progressively

recommendations.item: Create comprehensive test suite covering all factory methods
recommendations.rationale: Each factory method should be tested for correct HTTP status codes and error codes

recommendations.item: Add usage guide document linking error codes to i18n translation keys
recommendations.rationale: Error codes need translation - central reference would help maintain consistency

recommendations.item: Consider creating specific exception subclasses for domain areas (AuthException, ValidationException)
recommendations.rationale: Could provide additional type safety and domain-specific handling logic

recommendations.item: Add toJSON() extensibility for custom error response formatting
recommendations.rationale: Different endpoints may need different error response formats

recommendations.item: Add error code constants as enum or const object
recommendations.rationale: Would prevent typos in error codes and provide IDE autocompletion
